entry.title: what is the time period for archiving the invoices.
entry.content:
Hi folks,

when I am trying to open a attachment in a vendor invoice which is cleared in year2005. It gave me a message saying " this attachment/invoice has 0 pages to display" and when i checked the details of the attachment, it is in archived status.

After how many days these attachments will be archived. Is there any time period for these attachments ? which team will handle this archive activities.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Jump-start your SAP CAP(Node.js) Applications!
entry.content:
Great job
Thank you for sharing such great projects.

entry.title: SAP BI Platform CMS extracts
entry.content:
Hello,

I need help with extracting data from the CMS database. Specifically, I am looking to get information on all Connections, Documents, Schedules, Universes, and Users to generate reports. I have tried using the Query Builder, but I found it less user-friendly. I came across \SAP BusinessObjects\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\Samples\BI on BI, but I couldn't find any documentation on how to use the information in it.

Can you please provide me with some useful information? I would like to know how to utilize the JAVA SDK or the BIONBI Connection (BI platform CMS system database.cns) and Universe (BI platform CMS system database.unx). Additionally, do you have any sample Webi reports on top of this UNX?

Thank you.

I got an error when using method POST in Public Cloud, request with method GET is fine. I debug and see iv_uri always initial with method not POST/DELETE/PATCH in method GET it return correct uri (A_CustomerMaterial). Where did I go wrong please help me.


Thanks anyway.

entry.title: Need an option to download multiple proforma invoices all at once from sales document.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We would like to know, in SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud, how could we download multiple proforma invoices all at once from sales documents, I mean how can we download multiple sales order from one single shot. 

Need your support in this regards. We are expecting your support as soon as possible. 

Thank you 
Abul Hasnat

entry.title: How to restrict the user to create PO only with reference to PR based on PO document types.
entry.content: Dear experts, How to restrict the user to create PO only with reference to PR based on PO document types. I have tried with Define Screen Layout at Document Level -> Field Selection Group "Reference data, item" by flagging Purchase Requisition as Required Entry, but it didn't work the for field selection keys ME21N/NBF. Not sure where I am making mistakes in config setup. Please guide me on this.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Integration with FastAPI for File Uploads: Seeki...
entry.content:
REPORT ztest_030324.

CONSTANTS:
lc_content_type TYPE string VALUE 'Content-Type'.

DATA:
ls_desc TYPE soli,
lv_response TYPE string,
lt_data TYPE TABLE OF string,
ls_data TYPE string,
lv_data TYPE string,
lv_filename TYPE string VALUE 'C:\DUMMY\FILE.JSON',
lv_url TYPE string VALUE 'https://dummy-endpoint.com/upload/'.

* Data Declarations for http client.
DATA:
lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_http_client,
lo_rest_client TYPE REF TO cl_rest_http_client.

* Data Declarations for http client header.
DATA:
lt_headers TYPE tihttpnvp,
ls_headers LIKE LINE OF lt_headers,
lo_request_part TYPE REF TO if_http_entity,
lv_content_disposition TYPE string.

* Get the current active screen as a screenshot.
CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_upload
EXPORTING
filename = lv_filename
CHANGING
data_tab = lt_data
EXCEPTIONS
access_denied = 1
error_no_gui = 3
not_supported_by_gui = 4
OTHERS = 5.

* Convert the table of strings to a single string.
LOOP AT lt_data INTO ls_data.
CONCATENATE lv_data ls_data INTO lv_data.
ENDLOOP.

DATA: lv_datax TYPE xstring.

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
EXPORTING
text = lv_data
IMPORTING
buffer = lv_datax
EXCEPTIONS
failed = 1
OTHERS = 2.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
ENDIF.

cl_http_client=>create_by_url( EXPORTING url = lv_url IMPORTING client = lo_http_client ).
lo_http_client->request->set_header_field( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'multipart/form-data' ). "#EC NOTEXT
lo_request_part = lo_http_client->request->add_multipart( ).
lo_request_part->set_content_type( 'application/xml' ).
lv_content_disposition = |form-data; name="file"; filename="data.json" |.
lo_request_part->set_header_field( name = `Content-Disposition` value = lv_content_disposition ).
lo_request_part->set_data( data = lv_datax ).

* Set method as post method.
lo_http_client->request->set_method(
EXPORTING
method = if_http_entity=>co_request_method_post ).

lo_http_client->request->set_content_type(
EXPORTING
content_type = 'multipart/form-data'
).

* Prepare header of the API call.
CREATE OBJECT lo_rest_client
EXPORTING
io_http_client = lo_http_client.

ls_headers-name = lc_content_type.
ls_headers-value = 'application/json'.
APPEND ls_headers TO lt_headers.

CALL METHOD lo_rest_client->if_rest_client~set_request_headers
EXPORTING
it_header_fields = lt_headers.

* Send and receive the data to and from the dummy API endpoint.
lo_http_client->send(
EXCEPTIONS
http_communication_failure = 1
http_invalid_state = 2 ).

CHECK sy-subrc = 0.
lo_http_client->receive(
EXCEPTIONS
http_communication_failure = 1
http_invalid_state = 2
http_processing_failed = 3 ).

* Response manipulation to get the incident number.
lv_response = lo_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).

WRITE: / lv_response.

This is the ABAP code
Response ->

Like I saw there is a standard tool of 'Electronic Document Import Wizard''. But to configure that I might have to define the EFM project file.

entry.title: Re: I want to import 100 lines of GRPO in SAP B1
entry.content: Hi Ankit, yes we can use DTW, but this functionality would be used by the user on a daily basis. I was hoping if any other way was possible. Like I saw there is a standard tool of 'Electronic Document Import Wizard''. But to configure that I might have to define the EFM project file.

entry.title: Re: READ TABLE with OR condition
entry.content:
Nested LOOPs are only acceptable from a performance point of view, if the inner loop's are using a sorted/indexed table or if the tables are very small (less than 20-50 records), otherwise you will have a non-linear runtime behavior. The same non-linear runtime behavior O(n2) will happen if you place READ TABLE ... WITH KEY (without binary search), MODIFY WHERE ..., DELETE WHERE ... into a loop when the inner table is not sorted or indexed. The runtime can be improved if the inner table can be sorted before entering the outer loop. Sorting a standard table within a LOOP will also result in an O(n2) non-linear runtime.

I highly recommend the book ABAP Performance Tuning by Hermann Gahm (SAP Press, ISBN 978-1-59229-555-5) - see chapter 7 Processing of internal tables.

entry.title: Re: READ TABLE with OR condition
entry.content: If the WHERE condition of the inner loop is hard coded (B or C) but sorted descending by timestamp, then there should be a way to build this table without the Flag = A in the first place. Once you achieve that you only need to read the first entry.

entry.title: Facing issues to create Sales order (Create Record not working).
entry.content:
Hello,

I've been trying to create an application which showcases creating the sales order in the system. ( Using the API : API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
Initially, was facing CSRF Token validation failure issue. (403 Forbidden error). Then i tried bypassing it.. by setting the parameter : ~CHECK_CSRF_TOKEN to 0 in the SICF Configuration of service.

Now that error disappeared and another issue like "500 internal server error" (Error while processing the resource). 

(I tried using odata integration and BTP Destination REST API Integration as well but same issue.)


This is my input Record details: 
{SalesOrder: "1022", SalesOrderType: "OR", SalesOrganization: "UW00",DistributionChannel: "WH",OrganizationDivision:"BI",SoldToParty: "1000",PurchaseOrderByCustomer:"test", RequestedDeliveryDate:"2024-01-18T09:56:12.123Z"}


Can anybody help here what could be the potential problem?

Thanks in Advance!

Kindly help me to resolve the issue.

As a woman  who identifies with individuals in remote or underserved locations, minorities facing unequal opportunities, and first-generation college students, I bring a perspective shaped by resilience, adaptability, and a determination to overcome challenges.
Moreover I value the importance of embracing new opportunities and constantly upgrading my skill set. I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do.

Best Regards,

Amena

entry.title: How to enhance standard web service in C4C?
entry.content:
Hi,

in SAP Sales Cloud we have standard web services like BusinessPartnerReplicationIn.

Is there any possibility to enhance this or to define own logic.

In my case, I have to ignore the field "Textcollection" from the ERP, because it deletes our notes in C4C.

Another case: our C4C only allows to create BP Identification Numbers. If we got a update, we have many failures in the inbound.

Now how can I change or enhance the web services BusinessPartnerReplicationIn or ObjectIdentifierMappingReplicationIn ?

Thanks for answers

entry.title: FI-AA posting period management
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

Can someone please explain the logic behind system behavior in the following regard: -

1. In the 'Manage company code settings- asset accounting specific'; the last closed fiscal year is 2021 and the last day in cl. FY is 31.03.2022.

2. When we're trying to open the posting period 12.2023 for account type 'Asset 'in the 'manage posting periods' application, the following error shows up: First close all the fiscal years prior to 2023.

We understand that in AA, a maximum of 2 FY can be kept open but, in this case, we're not trying to open a new fiscal year (2024) rather just the 12th period in FY 2023. Can somebody please explain me why this error occurs?

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Re: Integrated Product Compliance and what comes next
entry.content:
Hello

reading the blog: I believe you are refering to "EHS Classic". Please do not the use the term "Product Compliance" if you refer to "EHS Classic to avoid conflict with the new SAP solution.

Many consultants (and companies using SAP) have many problesm with the terms SAP is using.

According to online help: "EHS Classic" is  defined here: as: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/8a399f5444164440ac4f426e847ec901/7209c453f57eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

The new "Product Compliance" software is described here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/35751be3d6ee423197492574e016a512/679a1d3744d34b43832da6890b9095c0.html?locale=en-US

The term "Product Compliance" (on the top) has some conflicts with this software: https://help.sap.com/docs/EHSM/c2db47abe44e4aa7ab1be93e4c20ae18/5b22b8d6606b4d32b8af9283901d3bdc.html?locale=en-US

This software does have a "submodule" which is as well called "Product Compliance"

Lot of confusions. And there are more to list (i will avoid to add more confusion here).

What comes next? from my point of view: Simple answer: EHS Classic is getting only "error corrections" and only if a "REACH Like" regulation might come up SAP will invest here.

SAP is focusing on the follow up solution "Product Compliance". Here we need to differentiate "On Premise" or "Cloud" Version. For the "On Premise" Version: the next major change will happen with S/4 HANA 2025. The Cloud version will be adjusted much faster.

This difference might be a reason to check: is "on premise" a good selection (for a S/4 HANA installation) or is a "privat cloud" not a better option?

Any how: According to SAP official Roadmap: The future is the new "Product Compliance" version.

With best wishes

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration: How to call iFlow from IAS-based application (Inbound)

entry.title: How to use Plan property of ui5 SaaS applications?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I created SaaS UI5 application with two plans and consumers can subscribe one of them. It looks very nice. But now I would like to know how I can try out my application in different modes or variations depend on choosen plan

For example, application has Free and Standard plan. Is it possible to separate the funtionality of application on controler level?

Part of my config SaaS service in mta.yaml looks like

appPlans:
  - name: Free
    description: Free plan
  - name: Standard
    description: Standard plan

Thx.

I am at the stage in the my career where I would love to help organizations set up for success.

br. 

Thami

entry.title: How to export CSV file with standard and custom API S/4HANA Cloud public edition
entry.content:
My customer request some requirements about processing CSV in S/4HANA Cloud. 

  1. Can I enhance logic of a standard API( ex OData, SOAP) to return CSV file for client who call API. Can I enhance logic of a standard API to store a CSV file in server or local? (S/4HANA Cloud-standard APIs)
  2. Can I create a custom API(ex OData, HTTP service) to return CSV file for client who call API. Can custome API store a CSV file in server or local?

About custom API, I created a simple HTTP service. But when I call FM GUI_DOWNLOAD to store a CSV file, I get an error that is using FM GUI_DOWNLOAD is not permitted.

I don't have technical knowledge to resolve this customer request. So, can hep me and give me knowledge related to my customer's request?

Best regards

entry.title: Deletion of sort sequence and manual storage bins Sorting for an activity in activity area
entry.content:
Go to /SCWM/SBST and choose AA and activity
Hit Display button

Export to spreadsheet as shown and name it as “Bin Sorting Upload”

Now Goto /SCWM/SRTUP and export a blank spreadsheet to get a template

Name it as “Binupload Template”

Now in this template, paste all the storage bins data from previously downloaded spreadsheet “Bin Sorting Upload”.
Save this excel file in  .csv format

Come to /SCWM/SRTUP

Upload this updated .csv file.
Press delete to remove the sort sequence of the bins that you want to change.

You will get a message

Now prepare your sort sequence with bins that you want for carrying out “PICK” in our case.
Save in csv format.
Now in sort upload screen, Upload and verify the details, if all good, hit create button.

After successful sorting you will get the message

All bins are sorted as per the manual sequence assigned through file upload.
Thanks!

entry.title: Re: I want to import 100 lines of GRPO in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi Samudra,

DTW also provides you an option for scheduled import functionality. You can import all the documents at a scheduled time using the batch file. Also, it will not require user intervention.

The Electronic Document Import Wizard provides dedicated functionality for importing electronic documents to the system. Are all your documents subject to Electronic document?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
Re: Integrated Product Compliance and what comes next
entry.content:
Hello

the term "Product Compliance" /and mayn similar terms)  isare used in many areas. Examples you will find here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/using-product-compliance-for-discrete-industries-prc-after-2025/qaq-p/12815476

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/classic-scope-about-the-product-compliance/qaq-p/12730867

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/ehs-product-compliance-search-compliance-information-app/qaq-p/12772900

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/sap-s-4hana-for-product-compliance-included-in-ehsm/qaq-p/12527104

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/history-of-sap-product-compliance-applications/ba-p/13580087

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/regulatory-compliance-module-options/qaq-p/12768092

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/sap-product-compliance-vs-sap-product-safety/qaq-p/12774091

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/help-on-sap-prc-product-and-reach-compliance/qaq-p/11410862

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/classic-scope-about-the-product-compliance/qaq-p/12730867

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/secret-superpower-within-product-compliance/ba-p/13574282

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/pfas-bans-and-product-compliance/ba-p/13559484

And many more blogs /questions/discussion  etc. could be listed here.

Therefore: it is important (from my perspective) to make clear: what is the focus? A special "SAP Software" (Module) or a "Business Process" or what else.

And with R/3 and S/4: it is not easy to seperate ! E.g. with S/4 the solution "SAP Product and Reach  Compliance" can not be used any more. If you use still R/3: you can go on with the use (at least from technical perspective).

Then with R/3 <> S/4: You have the (not easy to be understood) "Compatibility" approach used by SAP.

Anyhow:

You will find a lot of links using Google Discussing "what is Product Compliance" about. There is clearly an overlap to the SAP solutions; but not always.

C.B.

entry.title: Application for Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
    • First generation college students

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

Akash

entry.title: Re: PR release strategy at header level not triggering fo...
entry.content: PR is same, only new line items are being added in it by different persons due to which release strategy is getting removed.

entry.title: Move SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact/app content through SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Overview-

SAP Cloud Transport Management is a multi-tenant-aware application that guarantees tenant separation while streamlining the management of application-specific content and development artifacts. This means that you can use SAP BTP to effectively manage software deliverables across accounts in different environments (such Neo and Cloud Foundry), safely transferring them across different runtimes while keeping tenants unique from one another.

Pre-requisites-

Subaccount -

Integration Suite Subaccount (Alias DEV, QAS and PRD/ DEV and PRD) respectively

1.  Enable Cloud Foundry environment

2.  Entitlement Access:

a. Integration Suite

b. Process Integration Runtime

Cloud Transport Management Subaccount

3. Entitlement Access:

a. Cloud Transport Management

b. Content Agent Service

Set-up details-

Login to the Cloud Transport Management

Navigate to the option Transport Node-

Check transport node description and set-up-

Navigate to the transport route-

Navigate it to Landscape visualization-

Steps to move Artifact:

Go to cloud integration-

To transport the desired package, click on button Transport –

Fill in the comment in the space and click on Transport-

If the export of the package content is successful, then the below message will be popped up-

To import the transport in PRD, Login into the Cloud transport tenant Click on Transport Node.

Select the PRD Node, then select the transport Request and click on button Import Selected.

Status of the transport can be verify from column status.

Conclusion-

We discussed how to transport/move the artifacts via CTMS and set-up details.

Related informations-

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-transport-management 

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-transport-management/sap-cloud-transport-management/what-is-sap-cloud-transport-management 

Please share your feedback and your thoughts. Write back to me for questions and queries.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Field value not getting save filled using custom action

entry.title: How to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable?
entry.content:
Helli Everyone,

I have a requirement that to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable. In cube we have data as below.

Version 700 data in cube

OpCoVersionYCALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland70012.2023202312150
poland70012.202320241160
poland70012.202320242170

Version 100 data in cube

OpCoVersion0CALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland10012.2023202312180
poland1001.202420241190

In the bex query created a YCALMONTH based variable of manual input. If user enters 12.2023 as YCALMONTH, it means we are having 0CALYEAR's are 2023 and 2024 for YCALMONTH.

In for V100 if we have 2023 and 2024 as 0CALYEAR.

Question: In LY column how to pass 0calyear's based on ycalmonth's - 0calyear's on cube using customer exit variable?

 

Report
columns - 0CALYEAR2023 20242024
columns - version700100700100
rows - CYLYCYLY
 150180160190
   170 

So, how to write a customer exit variable to fetch 0calyear's of specific ycalmonth on cube and those 0calyear's: 2023, 2024 in V100 to pass to a variable.
BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing

BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)

entry.title: VSF + Safetystock SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hallo,

Wir befinden uns im Übergang vom reinen Sicherheitsbestand zur Planung mit Endmontage. Zur Planung wurden Durchschnittswerte der letzten 12 Monatssätze importiert, die sich nun monatlich im MD04 widerspiegeln und einen Bedarf erzeugen. Die Sicherheitsbestände sind noch verfügbar! Haben Sie Erfahrungen mit dem Umgang mit alten Sicherheitsbeständen? Reduzieren Sie stirbt und wenn ja, um wie viel %? Ich würde mich über jede Antwort freuen

entry.title: Re: How to use attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute in a SAP BPA Process?
entry.content:
This parameter seems to have to do with Process Visibility – to learn more, here is a video to start you off: https://youtu.be/qlo2itgC6-U which helps you monitor the processes.

Here, I created a variable for process visibility – newstatus is one of the inputs I defined for the process:

I have many instances, but I can add the parameter to my API call and it will retrieve only the processes that have this variable set to "APPROVED".

If I run it I will get only the instance that I just created using this process visibility variable.

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content: I ment i need the script

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content: I ment i need the script to a button i placed in one page of the story and on click on the button it will take me to a table that is placed on another page in the story

entry.title: Re: Facing issues to create Sales order (Create Record no...
entry.content:
500 is a very generic error message that there was a problem on the server. Can you provide more information, including screenshots?

  • What system are you calling?
  • Assuming OData integration, can you show the destination?
  • Can you show the setup in SAP Build Apps (i.e., the data resource)?
  • Can you show the test screen for the data resource? (I assume you are testing here and it fails.)
  • Can you show the developer tools and the network tab where it shows the payload and response?

Although I would hope it would send a different error, make sure the sales order payload works for your system (i.e., organizations and customers exist, ID is valid).

entry.title: Re: PAGE/APP Variable issue
entry.content: Maybe @Mari can give status of the bug, but there is a clear and easy workaround -- either refresh the page or don't delete "id" before adding other properties 🙂

entry.title: Re: Shipping to Vendor for repair and return
entry.content: Thanks JagdeepSingh. Yes my equipment is serialized component. Can you please eleborate the steps required as i am bit confused. Regular Purchase Requisition created against the local job order(work order) but without material number--> Regular PO using the same created PR --> 541 movement in MIGO to ship to vendor --> Shipping the physical component to vendor through ZLO-DT/Shipment --> Receiving the physical unit back from the vendor --> Perform GR(using MB1B-101) for the PO(initially created without material number). Then the serial number will reflect in my stock location (OR) do i need to perform separate movement to bring the unit in to my stock? Please correct me if i am wrong. Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: CDS-based BOPF to RAP Migration Tool
entry.content:
Thanks Steffen for this great blog.

Thanks for putting so much effort together with Martin Bretzer on this topic in the last two years.

You made it! We kept our promise to all customers who invested into RAP's predecessor: the ABAP Programming Model for SAP Fiori. Our customers can now integrate their investments into RAP and therefore into ABAP Cloud and the future!

entry.title: Re: CDS View: Time comparison
entry.content: Yes It is available from 758 only.

entry.title: PO for inter-company repair and return process
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you please help with the types of PO to be used for inter-company repair and return process, apart from CCSTO/SSTO(NBA type: C and D). Material-A being shipped from one plant to another plant for repair, in the return Material number has been change to B (Unit price vary) due to configuration requirements and this is affecting financial on repair plant. So we thought of sending the material for repair through PR and PO process. since same equipment number need to be returned back to origin upon repair completion,  it is difficult to identify the difference between regular buying-PO and R&R-PO. So we need your expert advise the right process to follow.

entry.title: Re: CDS View: Time comparison
entry.content: Currently, We are on 2022 FPS 03. Not sure if SAP_BW 758 component is compatible with our system.

entry.title: Re: Hello guys.
entry.content: I interested to study SAP FI S4HANA

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps composer pro feature requests
entry.content:
Thanks for all that ... I will definitely read up on all this permission granting stuff.

I just wanted to say that in my app when I ask the user to pick an image, I manually set he permissions going into my settings screens of my iPhone. I'm not specifically discussing the asking of permission by the app but the actual capability of the app to do what it wants. So I manually turned off camera and images for the preview app, and I could not pick images. But when I manually turned on images for the app I still could not pick images. Only when I granted camera permission to the app was it able to pick images.

I don't know how it works, and it could be that the app itself checked permissions of the camera, because it wanted them, and then decided not to allow the user to pick an image. All that seems a little weird but possible. I just want to make it clear it wasn't just an issue of being asked by the app.

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about MRP Areas in S/4HANA
entry.content: Hi Caetano - Excellend Information. I have one question though. If I want to run MRP Live for specific MRP Area, what needs to be done? Do we need to use Classic MRP by defining user exit? As I understand in MRP Live, there is no option for selecting MRP Area.

entry.title: How to read Master Data Consolidation Process ID?
entry.content: How to read Consolidation Process ID inside USMD_RULE_SERVICE BADI i.e. inside Check entity method

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanted to install again the image and I have this error when trying to pull the image:

Arngrim  D:\  11:45  docker pull sapse/abap-platform-trial
Using default tag: latest
Error response from daemon: manifest for sapse/abap-platform-trial:latest not found: manifest unknown: manifest unknown
Arngrim  D:\  11:46  docker pull sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909
Error response from daemon: manifest for sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909 not found: manifest unknown: manifest unknown

Could you check what is wrong with the image?

Thanks & regards

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Hi Denis, you have to use the good tag : docker pull sapse/abap-platform-trial:1909_SP01.

To SAP Team, it will be simple to use the tag latest to avoid this king of miss understanding.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to use attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute in a SAP BPA Process?
entry.content: The api is referring to attributes modeled in Visibility tab of Process details. You can model up to 15 simple typed attributes, by mapping to variables in the context. In the example, ExampleCustomAttribute is the Id of an attribute.

Rgds

Renuka

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 4

entry.title: Reporting data generated for disabled tracking workarea
entry.content:
Hello,

I didn't turn on the "Tracking Back End" option to my standard content connected workarea. I also didn't create assignment to it. But the reporting data for the standard content is appearing in Reporting options of the manager. How is this possible?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to start multiple hybirs locally.
entry.content:
If you have a look in hybris/bin/platform/project.properties you'll find commented properties about which ports are set. Generally the 3 you want to set to avoid collisions are

tomcat.http.port
tomcat.ssl.port
tomcat.ajp.port

Set them in each developer's local.properties

You need to run ant afterwards because it uses these properties to generate the Tomcat server.xml that defines the connectors.

You can avoid having to set tomcat.ajp.port by commenting out / removing the line

${tomcat.connectors.ajp.plain}

in hybris/config/tomcat/conf/server.xml (the template from which the running server.xml is generated)
AJP is only useful if you're putting Apache HTTPD in front of Tomcat. If the value of tomcat.ajp.port is unset then it wouldn't add the AJP connector but unfortunately at some point SAP added a default value for this setting in the platform project.properties so you can't unset it.

You also need to consider if your developers want to run the server in debug mode which also needs a unique port. You need to update the setting below and value of the address property from 8000 to something unique

tomcat.debugjavaoptions=-Djava.locale.providers=COMPAT,CLDR -Xdebug -Xnoagent -Xrunjdwp:transport=dt_socket,server=y,address=8000,suspend=n

Again, run ant after changing this.

Spoiler
ant deploy or ant server is the minimum you need to run or just ant or ant all will work but run a build too.

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 4

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
First generation college students

Driven by my extensive interest in SAP, I've taken courses on Udemy to enhance my knowledge and skills. Now, standing at the midpoint of my career, I am eager to embrace the SAP domain wholeheartedly. The SAP Digital Skills Initiative presents an invaluable opportunity for me to learn, grow, and obtain certification, allowing me to propel my career forward in the SAP landscape.

With utmost gratitude, I seek your support and acceptance of my application. Being selected to join this initiative would not only fulfill my aspirations but also enable me to contribute significantly to the SAP domain.

Thank you for considering my application, and I eagerly await the chance to participate in this life-changing opportunity.

entry.title: Retrieve a CSV file by API: only first row is retrieved
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm trying to retrieve a csv file from a rest API, but when the body is retrieved I have only the first row of csv. Below how I do, where is the mistake? (with Postman is ok)

Many thanks in advance.

example of csv

"sf__Id","sf__Error",Cod_cliente__c,Name,Partita_iva__c,Indirizzo__CountryCode__s,Indirizzo__StateCode__s,Indirizzo__City__s,Indirizzo__PostalCode__s,Indirizzo__Street__s

0008000141,COMPANY 1 S.P.A.,IT0201124,IT,PD,Padova,35020,"VIA test, 2"

cl_http_client=>create_by_url

go_http_client->request->set_header_fields( fields = lt_header_fields ).

go_http_client->request->set_method( if_http_request=>co_request_method_get ).

go_http_client->send

go_http_client->receive

gv_response = go_http_client->response->get_cdata( ).

here I have only the first row

entry.title: SAP Fiori: How to perform masking for Fiori applications with oData V4?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have implemented masking for Fiori applications. But as per the SAP Note: 2110725 OData V4.0 version is not supported for masking .We already have add-ons "UIDP-100" and "UIDPUI5-100" installed and masking solution is working for Fiori applications which are based on OData V2.0 version. Is there a solution already available for masking of such applications based on OData V4.0 version?

Regards,

Sumangala

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: unable to do bank reconciliation in sap b1
entry.content:
Hello,

 

The balance you're seeing is the last reconciliation balance, if this is the first time doing the reconciliation, then it's correct.

Just proceed and enter the bank statement balance to continue with the reconciliation.

I hope this helps.

entry.content:

Any help?

 

 

Thank you.

entry.content:
I am very much interested to take participate as a volunteer in SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024.Moreover, I'm eager to forge new connections and friendships with fellow volunteers and attendees alike. There's something special about coming together with people who share your passions and interests, exchanging ideas, and building meaningful relationships that extend beyond the confines of the event itself.

I am from SAP ABAP developer background also works in SAP RAP and Odata services as per my interest and wants to connect with senior of same domain. @DataTherapist  can I contribute as volunteer? I hope to learn and be better version of myself as a professional and personal through this volunteering event and knowledge sharing session.

 

SAP Inside Track #SIT Kolkata #Kolkata #SITKOL2024

entry.title: Create Quiz App with Cloud Foundry Python Buildpack
entry.content:
Introduction:

In this blog post, I will explain how to use Business application studio to create a python app in BTP cloud foundry.

Prerequisite:

Tutorial Link: Create an Application with Cloud Foundry Python Buildpack

Setup:

  1. Create a new dev space. 
  2. Create a new project from template of type basic multi-target application.
  3. Create a directory named 'quizapp' with the structure as below. 
  4. The contents of files are as below. 'manifest.yml' contains the application name.

 

 

 

applications:
- name: QuizApp

 

 

 

  • runtime.txt :

 

 

 

python-3.11.7

 

 

 

  • requirements.txt:

 

 

 

requests~=2.31.0
flask~=3.0.2
gunicorn~=21.2.0​

 

 

 

  • Procfile:

 

 

 

web: gunicorn -b 0.0.0.0:$PORT app:app​

 

 

 

  • app.py:

 

 

 

from flask import Flask, render_template, request
import requests
import random

list_of_questions = []
DB_URL = "https://opentdb.com/api.php"
list_of_options = {
    "Books": 10,
    "Film": 11,
    "Music": 12,
    "Television": 14,
    "Video Games": 15,
    "Comics": 29
}

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route('/')
def home():
    return render_template('home.html', options=list(list_of_options.keys()))


@app.route('/quiz', methods=['POST'])
def display_quiz():
    selected_option = request.form['choice']
    query_params = {
        "amount": 30,
        "category": list_of_options[selected_option],
        "type": "multiple"
    }
    response = requests.get(url=DB_URL, params=query_params)
    data = response.json()['results']
    random.shuffle(data)
    global list_of_questions
    list_of_questions = []
    list_of_questions = data[:10]
    for ques in list_of_questions:
        options = ques['incorrect_answers']
        options.append(ques['correct_answer'])
        random.shuffle(options)
        ques['options'] = options

    return render_template('quiz.html', questions=list_of_questions)


@app.route('/submit', methods=['POST'])
def submit_quiz():
    score = 0
    for index, ques in enumerate(list_of_questions, start=1):
        user_answer = request.form.get(f"question_{index}")
        correct_answer = ques['correct_answer']
        if user_answer == correct_answer:
            score += 1

    return render_template('result.html', score=score)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run()
​

 

 

 

  • home.html

 

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link href="static/home.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="icon" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='favicon.ico') }}" type="image/x-icon">
    <title>Category for Entertainment Quiz</title>
</head>
<body>
 <h1>Do you have a passion for entertainment?</h1>
    <form action="{{url_for('display_quiz')}}" method="post">
        <label for="dropdown">Select a category for Quiz:</label>
        <select id="dropdown" name="choice">
            {% for option in options %}
                <option value="{{ option }}">{{ option }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
        <br><br>
        <input type="submit" value="Submit">
    </form>
</body>
</html>​

 

 

 

  • quiz.html

 

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link href="static/quiz.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="icon" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='favicon.ico') }}" type="image/x-icon">
    <title>Entertainment Quiz</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Quiz Questions</h1>
    <form action="{{ url_for('submit_quiz') }}" method="post">
        <ol>
            {% set question_index = namespace(value=1) %}
            {% for ques in questions %}
                <li>
                    <p>{{ loop.index }}. {{ ques['question'] | safe }}</p>
                    <ul>
                        {% for option in ques['options'] %}
                            <li>
                                <label>
                                    <input type="radio" name="question_{{question_index.value}}"  value="{{ option }}">
                                    {{ option | safe}}
                                </label>
                            </li>
                        {% endfor %}
                        {% set question_index.value=question_index.value+1 %}
                    </ul>
                </li>
            {% endfor %}
        </ol>
        <input type="submit" value="Submit">
    </form>
</body>
</html>
​

 

 

 

  • result.html

 

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link href="static/result.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="icon" href="{{ url_for('static', filename='favicon.ico') }}" type="image/x-icon">
    <title>Quiz Result</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Quiz Result</h1>
    <div id="result-container">
        <p>Your score is: {{ score }} out of 10</p>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
​

 

 

 

  • For css files, you can style as per your preference.

Deploy

Log in to SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment:

 

 

 

cf login

 

 

 

Deploy the application on Cloud Foundry:

 

 

 

cf push

 

 

 

After successful deployment, the application will be visible in dev space.

 

Conclusion:

  1. Flask web framework is used along with Jinja2 template. All the html files are inside 'templates' folder and all css/image files are under the 'static' folder.
  2. For quiz question generation, Trivia API is used.
  3. Demo Execution: Video link.

entry.title: Re: Streams in RAP : Uploading PDF , Excel and Other Files in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

If you're encountering the error "The file is too big. The maximum size allowed is 0.000 MB.", the solution is simple. Check the size of the field (attachment content) in your table. That size will be the maximum file size allowed.

For example: I tested it here with a file up to 265 characters, and the upload worked. If I add just one more character, it starts to give an error.



Simply increase this size to solve the problem, or set it to zero for "unlimited".

I tested today (March 3, 2024) in the SAP BTP Trial environment, using both OData V2 and V4. The only difference is that in V2, instead of displaying a popup warning of the error, it resulted in a DUMP.

@ashutosh9112 @termanico

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud Sales Order number of Custom Fields limit
entry.content: Hello Marco, in which business context did you create custom field for sales order item?

entry.title: Re: SIT Kolkata 2024 Interest

I am looking forward to this event SAP Inside Track Kolkata 2024 and I am hoping this year it would much more bigger and eventful than our previous year. I am keenly interested to actively participate in this event and I will feel myself honoured if I can support in any form to make the event a grand success.

Being a ABAP developer, I am seeing this event to connect with people from same domain and to be in touch with people from various industries and domains. 

#SAPinsidetrackkolkata. #SIT

#SAP. @DataTherapist  Looking forward for all your inputs to make this event a grand success.

entry.title: IAS as proxy
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have configured SAP IAS as a proxy to Azure AD.

The groups from Azure AD (Groups Claim) are mapped to SAP BTP under "Role Collections" -> "User Groups"->Object ID from Azure Group.

However, how can I map or synchronize the groups that I have created in IAS to SAP BTP?

Is it to recommended to map  the groups from Azure to IAS ?

Thank you very much.
